zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Burnell於1290年出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Phillip Burnell26歲，母親Matilda FitzAlan26歲。她於1309年與John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel在英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1341年5月17日在英國肯特哈德洛福享年51歲，埋葬在英國肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Burnell于1290年出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，她的父亲Phillip Burnell26岁，母亲Matilda FitzAlan26岁。她于1309年与John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel在英国諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1341年5月17日在英国肯特哈德洛福享年51岁，埋葬在英国肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Burnell was born in 1290, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, her father, Phillip Burnell, was 26 and her mother, Matilda FitzAlan, was 26. She married John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel in 1309, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 17 May 1341, in Hadlow, Kent, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Burnell est née en 1290, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Phillip Burnell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda FitzAlan, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel en 1309, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1341, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1309 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Mai 1341 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Hadlow, Kent, England und wurde in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Burnell è nata il nel 1290 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Phillip Burnell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Matilda FitzAlan, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel nel 1309, nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Maud Burnellが1290年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Phillip Burnellは26歳，母Matilda FitzAlanは26歳であった。1309年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュでJohn Lovell 2nd Lord Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1341年5月17日にイギリスケントハドロウで51歳で死去し，イギリスケントハドロウスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Maud Burnell(이)가 1290년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillip Burnell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda FitzAlan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 5월 17일 영국 켄트 하들로에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Burnell nasceu em 1290, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip Burnell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda FitzAlan, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel em 1309, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1341, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, хадлоу, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Burnell родилась в 1290 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Phillip Burnell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda FitzAlan, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel в 1309 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 мая 1341 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, хадлоу, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Burnell nació en 1290, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Phillip Burnell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda FitzAlan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel en 1309, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1341, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra.
